_note: Package names verified against the npm registry + the official Contentstack docs (https://www.contentstack.com/docs/studio/set-up-studio-for-a-csr-project, https://www.contentstack.com/docs/studio/set-up-studio-for-a-ssr-project). Do NOT add packages here without verifying both: (1) HTTP 200 from https://registry.npmjs.org/<name>, AND (2) presence in the official setup doc for that product.
